description: Golden evaluation set for GraphRAG aerospace regulatory corpus. 40 questions across single-hop, multi-hop, contradiction, temporal, and authority-chain retrieval types.

questions.question: What does FAA-AD-2024-01-02 require operators to do?
Which regulation body mandated FAA-AD-2024-01-02?
What aircraft type does FAA-AD-2024-01-02 apply to?
Who manufactures the Boeing 737 MAX?
What engine is fitted to the Boeing 737 MAX?
What is the status of MCAS Software v2.0 relative to v1.0?
Which airline operates Boeing 737 MAX aircraft?
What EASA airworthiness directive covers the Airbus A320neo?
Which regulation superseded all previous FAA airworthiness directives for the Boeing 737 MAX engine mount?
questions.note: Requires traversing SUPERSEDES chain across 3 ADs

questions.question: What is the full authority chain from FAA-AD-2024-01-02 back to the original 2020 directive?
What maintenance procedure is required for the engine fitted to the aircraft covered by FAA-AD-2024-01-02?
questions.note: Requires AD → aircraft → engine → maintenance chain

questions.question: Which airlines are affected by MCAS software requirements?
What regulatory basis does EASA-AD-2024-0072 derive from?
What is the relationship between the FAA, Boeing 737 MAX, and CFM LEAP-1B engine?
Is the Boeing 737 MAX currently compliant with FAA-AD-2020-05-11?
questions.note: Correct answer: surface the contradiction, not pick a side

questions.question: What do the documents say about the 737 MAX airworthiness status?
Which document currently governs engine mount inspection for the Boeing 737 MAX?
questions.note: FAA-AD-2024 is the authoritative document; older ones are superseded

questions.question: Is FAA-AD-2020-05-11 still the governing airworthiness directive?
What is the effective regulatory hierarchy for Boeing 737 MAX engine inspections?
Does FAA-AD-2024-01-02 supersede the 2020 directive, even though they don't directly reference each other?
questions.note: Requires forward-chaining inference over the SUPERSEDES chain

questions.question: If Southwest Airlines operates Boeing 737 MAX, are they subject to FAA-AD-2024-01-02?
questions.note: Operator → aircraft type → applicable ADs chain

questions.question: Can an AD issued by EASA apply to aircraft operated under FAA jurisdiction?
questions.note: Reasoning question — tests whether the system handles jurisdictional scope

questions.question: Does FAA-AD-2024-01-02 apply to the Airbus A320neo?
Is there a FAA airworthiness directive governing Airbus aircraft?
Does Airbus manufacture the Boeing 737 MAX?
What was the first FAA airworthiness directive in this corpus?
Which MCAS software version is current?
Between 2020 and 2024, how many FAA airworthiness directives were issued for the 737 MAX engine mount?
Trace the complete regulatory path from the FAA to the maintenance crew servicing the CFM LEAP-1B engine.
questions.note: Multi-hop question designed to trigger agentic IRCoT fallback

questions.question: What is the full compliance story for Southwest Airlines and the 737 MAX MCAS system?
questions.note: Combines fleet, software, and regulatory threads

questions.question: Explain how the 2022 directive relates to both the 2020 and 2024 directives, and what this means for current operators.
What does 14 CFR Part 39 govern, and which directive in this corpus references it?
What is the difference between CS-25 and 14 CFR Part 39?
questions.note: Background knowledge question — tests breadth of retrieval

questions.question: What aircraft configuration is covered by the EASA directive?
What is the exact document ID of the 2022 FAA airworthiness directive?
What embedding cosine threshold does the platform use for entity deduplication?
questions.note: Tests whether architectural metadata is retrievable

questions.question: What is the Wikidata item type for an organization (P31)?
questions.note: Tests Wikidata grounding in entity metadata

questions.question: Is there any evidence of conflicting compliance status for a specific aircraft in this corpus?
How confident should I be in a conclusion drawn from a single internal document?
questions.note: Calibration awareness — tests whether the system hedges on thin evidence

questions.question: What retrieval stages does the platform use to answer questions?
questions.note: Self-knowledge question — retrieved from documentation chunks

questions.question: What is the role of the IRCoT agentic retriever?
